pages.full_text:
Recommended place to go for a coffee near
Lake Orta
Villa Nigra, __Manicella__ (sp?)

Ski lift right next to Restaurant Zerotta (hotel?) near
Mont Blanc, near Cour Mayeur.
pages.notes: Appears to be a miscellaneous notes page (not a diary entry) with recommendations for places to visit. 'Manicella (sp?)' — the writer themselves doubts their spelling; could also read as 'Manicella' or 'Menicella'. 'Cour Mayeur' likely refers to Courmayeur (near Mont Blanc, Italy), spelled phonetically. 'Restaurant Zerotta' — could also read 'Zerotta' or 'Zeratta'. No date or year evident from the page itself; year cannot be determined from page content alone.
Page is blank (decorated endpaper pattern only, no handwritten text).
